front.title: A JSON-Based Format for Publishing IP Ranges of Automated HTTP Clients

abstract.t: This document defines a standardized JSON format for operators of automated HTTP clients (e.g., web crawlers, AI bots) to publicly disclose their IP address ranges. A consistent, machine-readable format for IP range publication simplifies the task of identifying and verifying legitimate automated traffic, thereby decreasing maintenance load on website operators while reducing the risk of inadvertently blocking beneficial clients. This specification codifies and extends common existing practices to provide a simple yet extensible format that accommodates a variety of use cases.
